case_title: AMARILIS DIAZ RIVAS VS. MARY WHITLEY

docket_entries.description: DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR (INCLUDES: $6.12 INTEREST) BY DEFENDANT WHITLEY, MARY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2019 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT WHITLEY, MARY
ORDER RE: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM
SIGNED JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ RIVAS, AMARILIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2019 BY GREG GROENEVELD. PLAINTIFF AMARILIS DIAZ RIVAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARY WHITLEY IS PRESENT. WITNESS MARCUS EDWARDS AND MARIE WILLIAMS TESTIFY ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PARTIES AGREE TO MEDIATION. PARTIES ARE SWORN IN AND MEDIATION IS HELD IN DEPT 525. PARTIES ARE UNABLE TO REACH AN AGREEMENT. HEARING IS HELD. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ RIVAS, AMARILIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITLEY, MARY $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $930.00, THE DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE AN ITEMIZED STATEMENT AS REQUIRED BY CIVIL CODE 1950.5(G) AND FORFEITED HER RIGHT TO DEDUCT THE UNPAID RENT FROM THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $936.12 RE 36139 FOR TRANSACTION W1619A18D005 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO AMARILIS DIAZ RIVAS, DOC#1910348598, WARRANT #38206231, DATED JAN-09-2020
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, JUDGMENT PAID IN CASH TO COURT AS TO DEFENDANT WHITLEY, MARY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY DIAZ RIVAS, AMARILIS AS TO DEFENDANT WHITLEY, MARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED AUG-27-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITLEY, MARY
